rejections.reason: Carried an uncorroborated claim about GPT-5.6 government-gated availability that was contradicted by primary sources during the 2026-07-09 night run. Fails accountability criterion.
Relays paywalled reporting from other outlets rather than reporting independently. Fails originality criterion (aggregator).
Reads as an automated aggregator without a staffed newsroom or named authors. Fails originality and accountability criteria. Re-evaluate only if editorial practices become verifiable.
